long_description:
Reserve the attached list of Servers for IBM-GT23,
Please use the bm-reserve-unreserve CFN to reserve these nodes for this account.

Account Id: 3b7bd1c3612d4a40b721a0afa52b22da

1. che2-qz1-sr2-rk095-s34
2. che3-qz1-sr2-rk176-s08
Incident source: None - Greg Westmoreland

===== UPDATED INSTRUCTIONS SINCE cFn DOES NOT WORK IN NGDC ======

From Zone 2 master node:
`kubectl -n genctl label servernode che2-qz1-sr2-rk096-s34 reserved=3b7bd1c3612d4a40b721a0afa52b22da`
From Zone 3 master node:
`kubectl -n genctl label servernode che3-qz1-sr3-rk176-s08 reserved=3b7bd1c3612d4a40b721a0afa52b22da`
short_description: Reserve the attached list of Servers for IBM-GT23
